title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 18 October 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 18 October 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 18 October 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 19/10/2024
This week, the ship recycling industry across key regions remained relatively stable, with most markets seeing little change from the previous week. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-10-19_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-12-October-18-October-2024_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2024-10-19_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-12-October-18-October-2024_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
12 October - 18 October 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week, the ship recycling industry across key regions remained relatively stable, with most markets seeing little change from the previous week. In India,
the market continues to follow a familiar pattern of brief recovery phases followed by downturns, reflecting ongoing volatility.
